decision.rationale: The plate turnarounds/body-back.png fails to honor multiple cited identity rules: 1. IR.sean.proportion.head-to-body-1-to-7 (FAILED): The character's head height (from crown at y=32 to neck base at y=252 is 220px) fits only ~4.7 to 4.9 times into the total body height of 1025px (crown to sole at y=1056). This makes the head significantly oversized, reading as a stylized ~1:5 ratio instead of the required 1:7 heroic-realistic proportion. 2. IR.sean.proportion.shoulder-width-1-5-head-widths (BORDERLINE/FAILED): The shoulder width (outside-of-deltoid to outside-of-deltoid is ~300px) is ~1.58 to 1.62 times the head width (189px including hair). Additionally, the shoulder line slopes downwards instead of remaining roughly horizontal at a neutral pose. 3. IR.sean.costume.default-outfit-locked (FAILED): The feet are drawn with highly detailed black and white sneakers and thick jean cuffs, violating the rule that no shoes should be detailed and feet must read as silhouette-level shapes at the base. 4. IR.sean.prop.stylus-right-hand-always (FAILED): The stylus is completely missing; the right arm/hand silhouette does not carry the stylus grip, and both hands are empty.
